claims.claim: Israel Invoice Reform allocation-number threshold steps down in 2026: 10,000 NIS from Jan 1 2026, then 5,000 NIS from June 1 2026 (in force as of June 2026); 5,000 NIS planned to continue into 2027. The threshold was 20,000 NIS in 2025.
claims.raw_snippet: Israel lowered the real-time invoice (allocation number) threshold to 5,000 NIS / 5,000 ש"ח effective June 1, 2026, down from 10,000 NIS / 10,000 ש"ח at the start of 2026.

claims.claim: Israel standard VAT rate is 18% (since Jan 1 2025, unchanged in 2026).
claims.raw_snippet: Value-added tax (VAT) is imposed on most goods and services at the standard rate of 18%.

claims.claim: 2026 salaried-employee National Insurance (Bituach Leumi) rates: employer 4.51% reduced / 7.60% full; employee 1.04% reduced / 7.00% full. Reduced rate applies up to 7,703 NIS (60% of average wage); full rate from there up to the 51,910 NIS maximum insurable income.
claims.raw_snippet: ביטוח לאומי לעובד שכיר 2026: מעסיק 4.51% מופחת / 7.60% מלא; עובד 1.04% מופחת / 7.00% מלא. שיעור מופחת עד 7,703 ש"ח, שיעור מלא עד תקרה של 51,910 ש"ח.

claims.claim: 2026 salaried-employee Health Insurance (Bituach Briut) rates are EMPLOYEE-ONLY (employers pay no health share): 3.23% reduced (up to 7,703 NIS) / 5.17% full.
claims.raw_snippet: דמי ביטוח בריאות מנוכים מהעובד בלבד: 3.23% עד 7,703 ש"ח ו-5.17% מעל לכך. אין חלק מעסיק בביטוח בריאות.

claims.claim: Israeli mandatory pension under the Extension Order totals 18.5% of salary: employee 6.0%, employer 6.5% benefits (tagmulim) plus employer 6% severance (pitzuim) = 12.5% employer. Keren hishtalmut (education fund), where offered, is commonly 7.5% employer and 2.5% employee.
claims.raw_snippet: פנסיה חובה: סך 18.5% מהשכר - עובד 6%, מעסיק 6.5% תגמולים ועוד 6% פיצויים (סה"כ מעסיק 12.5%). קרן השתלמות נפוצה: מעסיק 7.5% ועובד 2.5%.

claims.claim: Make.com Free plan includes 1,000 operations (credits) per month, max 2 active scenarios, 15-minute minimum interval.
claims.raw_snippet: Free plan: 1,000 operations per month, no cost.

claims.claim: Morning is the rebrand of Green Invoice (Hashbonit Yeruqa); its API domain remains greeninvoice.co.il. Document amounts are decimal shekels (e.g. price 15000 = 15,000 NIS), NOT agorot. Auth is API key + secret exchanged for a JWT (valid ~1 hour), not OAuth2.
claims.raw_snippet: Authenticate by posting the API key id and secret to receive a JWT bearer token valid about one hour; document amounts are decimal values in the document currency.

claims.claim: The Make.com Morning module is community-built (listed as 'Morning by Callbox'); Make does not maintain or support it; it requires the Best subscription tier or higher and exposes actions only (no trigger/watch module).
claims.raw_snippet: Morning by Callbox. Make does not maintain or support this integration. Requires Best plan or higher.

claims.claim: Cardcom API v11 reports to a Notify URL via HTTP POST with a JSON body (success ResponseCode 0 with Description, plus TranzactionId and Amount). The legacy LowProfile / Name-to-Value (v10) flow posts form-encoded fields (OperationResponse, CardOwnerID, NumOfPayments, etc.) and its redirect IndicatorUrl is a GET.
claims.raw_snippet: Cardcom API v11 third-party reporting posts a JSON body; ResponseCode 0 indicates success. Legacy LowProfile uses Name-to-Value form fields.

claims.claim: Grow is an independent Israeli fintech (successor brand to Meshulam), NOT affiliated with Bank Leumi.
claims.raw_snippet: Grow (by Meshulam) is an independent Israeli payments/fintech company for businesses.

claims.claim: Make.com offers an official cloud-hosted MCP server (mcp.make.com / developers.make.com/mcp-server) that exposes scenarios as agent tools, and Make AI Agents (launched April 2025).
claims.raw_snippet: Make MCP Server lets you expose your Make scenarios as tools for AI assistants; AI Agents are available in Make.

claims.claim: Priority ERP exposes standard OData entity endpoints used in the skill: /AINVOICES (A/R invoices), /PINVOICES (A/P invoices), /CUSTOMERS, /SUPPLIERS, /ORDERS, /PORDERS, /PART, /LOGCOUNTERS. Base URL pattern is https://{your-priority-domain}/odata/Priority/tabula.ini/{company}/{entity} (and https://{domain}/odata/Priority/tabula.ini/{company}/{entity}).
claims.raw_snippet: Priority REST/OData API exposes entities such as AINVOICES, PINVOICES, CUSTOMERS, SUPPLIERS, ORDERS, PORDERS, PART, LOGCOUNTERS at /odata/Priority/tabula.ini/{company}/{entity}.

claims.claim: External API endpoints and documentation URLs referenced by the skill (verified reachable or documented as of June 2026): the Make MCP endpoints, Hebcal, Israeli SMS providers, WhatsApp Cloud API, and Green Invoice/Morning API hosts. Template URLs with placeholders are documentation examples, not live hosts.
claims.raw_snippet: Endpoints: https://mcp.make.com https://developers.make.com/mcp-server https://<MAKE_ZONE>.make.com https://www.hebcal.com/hebcal?v=1&cfg=json&year=now&month=now&maj=on&geo=pos&latitude=32.0853&longitude=34.7818 http://api.inforu.co.il/SendMessage.asmx https://019sms.co.il/api https://www.sms4free.co.il/ApiSMS/SendSMS https://graph.facebook.com/{api-version}/{phone-number-id}/messages https://api.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1/ https://sandbox.d.greeninvoice.co.il/api/v1/ https://{domain}/odata/Priority/tabula.ini/{company}/{entity} https://{your-priority-domain}/odata/Priority/tabula.ini/{company}/{entity}

claims.claim: Non-regulatory formatting and illustrative examples in the skill: the Morning API decimal-shekels example uses price: 50 = 50 שקל / 50 shekels (not agorot); a number-formatting example renders ₪1,234.56; ILS amounts are shown to 2 / ILS 4 decimal places in formatting demos; a 15% example illustrates a discount/markup transformation. These are illustrative values, not external facts.
claims.raw_snippet: Document amounts are decimal shekels (e.g. price: 50 = 50 שקל); formatNumber renders values like ₪1,234.56; examples illustrate ILS formatting and a 15% transformation.
